---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggpubr)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```


## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "actin_RF.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
```

```{r}
rate_240227 <- readRDS("240227.RDS")
rate_240227$batch <- "240227" 
rate_240227$img <- rate_240227$img %>% str_replace( "\\.dv.*", ".dv")
rate_241023 <- readRDS("241023.RDS")
rate_241023$batch <- "241023" 
rate_241025 <- readRDS("241025.RDS")
rate_241025$batch <- "241025"

rate_summary <- rbind (rate_240227, rate_241023, rate_241025)
```


```{r}
rate_summary_2 <- rate_summary %>%
  group_by(img, growth) %>% 
   rstatix::get_summary_stats(mean) %>% as.data.table()

#rate_summary$ID <- paste(rate_summary$img, rate_summary$period, sep = "_")

rate_summary_2 $img %>% table()
```


```{r}
rate_summary <- rate_summary  %>% filter(!is.na(growth))

outliers <- rate_summary %>% 
  group_by(growth) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

rate_summary <- rate_summary [! (ID %in% outliers$ID) ]
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
library(plotly)
my_comparisons <- list(c("extension", "retraction"))

#my_comparisons <- S2S3_wave_count_2$group %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

rate_summary_2 %>% #mutate(group = factor(group, levels=c("axon_before",   "axon_after", "minor_before", "minor_after"))) %>% 
ggplot ( aes(x=growth, y=mean, fill =growth) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=pj)+
 # geom_line(aes(group = Label))+
  
   geom_point(position = pj) +
geom_path(aes(group = img),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
    
    
#scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-2, 12), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=T)+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "actinRF_ext_ret.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

dev.off()
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "actin_RF.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```
